Winki Pop & Fairy Bower

Published on 19 . 08 . 2014 • Shelly-beach

There was a large swell in town so I went for a walk down to Deadmans behind Shelly Beach to take some video of the surfers taking on the big waves.

Lightning

Published on 22 . 12 . 2013 • Manly-beach

I was standing out on our balcony and noticed lightning on the horizon so I grabbed my camera and tripod and headed to the roof. It wasn’t raining which was good and I must have taken about 50 long exposure shots trying to capture the lightning. Most of the photos came out rubbish but I managed to get a few good ones.

Read full post →
